% per-host breakdown of prospective DFT validation
% generated by scripts/make_per_host_table.py
\begin{table}[h]
\centering
\caption{Per-host breakdown of \modelname's prospective DFT validation, after per-dopant chemical-potential offset correction. ``$n_A$/$n_B$'' is the count of SCF-converged candidates in bucket A (low-$E_f$ confident) and bucket B (high-$\sigma$ OOD). ``hit'' is the count in bucket A with DFT-corrected $E_f^{\rm DFT,corr}<+1$\,eV. ``worst $|\mathrm{err}|$'' reports the largest single-candidate residual on each host (in eV, with the offending dopant in parentheses).}
\label{tab:per-host}
\begin{tabular}{lrrrrrl}
\toprule
Host & $n_A$ & $n_B$ & $\langle\mu_{\rm pred}\rangle_A$ & $\langle E_f^{\rm DFT,corr}\rangle_A$ & A hit & worst $|\mathrm{err}|$ \\
      &  &  & (eV) & (eV) & ($<\!1$\,eV) & (eV, dopant) \\
\midrule

  BiITe                & 0 & 3 & --- & --- & --- & 0.00 (Au) \\
  Ge$_2$               & 0 & 1 & --- & --- & --- & 4.06 (Pb) \\
  Mo$_2$CO$_2$         & 0 & 2 & --- & --- & --- & 5.01 (Bi) \\

  NiSe$_2$             & 0 & 1 & --- & --- & --- & 4.69 (Bi) \\
  Pd$_2$Se$_4$         & 2 & 2 & -0.43 & +1.11 & 1/2 & 3.76 (Bi) \\
  PtS$_2$              & 2 & 0 & +0.41 & +0.69 & 2/2 & 0.57 (In) \\
  PtSe$_2$             & 1 & 0 & -0.05 & -1.30 & 1/1 & 1.25 (In) \\
  SnS$_2$              & 3 & 0 & -0.04 & -0.03 & 2/3 & 1.76 (Ir) \\
  SnSe$_2$             & 0 & 2 & --- & --- & --- & 1.76 (Ir) \\
  TaS$_2$              & 1 & 0 & +0.04 & +1.94 & 0/1 & 1.90 (Pb) \\
  Ti$_2$CO$_2$         & 4 & 3 & +0.33 & -0.56 & 4/4 & 3.54 (In) \\
